creator: f3bandit@gmail.com
text:
Newer battery backup devices don't support battery level, battery install date, etc. Except thru their proprietary software. Can someone make changes to the apcupsd to allow setting the battery install date manually. example pfsense uses
the most current apcupsd package, but those of use with newer battery backups.
cannot set this in the eprom on our devices as the manufacturer blocks setting those values or apcupsd doesn't know how to communicate with that particular model. I think adding a simple drop down option for unsupported model to set that value manually would be a easy option.
